mapper.sql: CONT_REL_NO, CONT_REL_SEQ, CONT_REL_GB_CD, CONT_ROLE, CONT_NO, LINK_CONT_NO, CONT_REL_INFO, CONT_REL_USE_YN, REG_USER_ID, REG_DT, LAST_MOD_USER_ID, LAST_MOD_DT
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from t_cont_rel
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert:
insert into t_cont_rel
CONT_REL_NO,
CONT_REL_SEQ,
CONT_REL_GB_CD,
CONT_ROLE,
CONT_NO,
LINK_CONT_NO,
CONT_REL_INFO,
CONT_REL_USE_YN,
REG_USER_ID,
REG_DT,
LAST_MOD_USER_ID,
LAST_MOD_DT,
#{contRelNo,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{contRelSeq,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{contRelGbCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{contRole,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{contNo,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{linkContNo,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{contRelInfo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{contRelUseYn,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{regUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{regDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{lastModUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{lastModDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update t_cont_rel
CONT_REL_NO = #{row.contRelNo,jdbcType=BIGINT},
CONT_REL_SEQ = #{row.contRelSeq,jdbcType=BIGINT},
CONT_REL_GB_CD = #{row.contRelGbCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CONT_ROLE = #{row.contRole,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CONT_NO = #{row.contNo,jdbcType=BIGINT},
LINK_CONT_NO = #{row.linkContNo,jdbcType=BIGINT},
CONT_REL_INFO = #{row.contRelInfo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CONT_REL_USE_YN = #{row.contRelUseYn,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
REG_USER_ID = #{row.regUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
REG_DT = #{row.regDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
LAST_MOD_USER_ID = #{row.lastModUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
LAST_MOD_DT = #{row.lastModDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},

update t_cont_rel set CONT_REL_NO = #{row.contRelNo,jdbcType=BIGINT}, CONT_REL_SEQ = #{row.contRelSeq,jdbcType=BIGINT}, CONT_REL_GB_CD = #{row.contRelGbCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CONT_ROLE = #{row.contRole,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CONT_NO = #{row.contNo,jdbcType=BIGINT}, LINK_CONT_NO = #{row.linkContNo,jdbcType=BIGINT}, CONT_REL_INFO = #{row.contRelInfo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CONT_REL_USE_YN = #{row.contRelUseYn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, REG_USER_ID = #{row.regUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, REG_DT = #{row.regDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, LAST_MOD_USER_ID = #{row.lastModUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LAST_MOD_DT = #{row.lastModDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}

update t_cont_rel
CONT_REL_GB_CD = #{contRelGbCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CONT_ROLE = #{contRole,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CONT_NO = #{contNo,jdbcType=BIGINT},
LINK_CONT_NO = #{linkContNo,jdbcType=BIGINT},
CONT_REL_INFO = #{contRelInfo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CONT_REL_USE_YN = #{contRelUseYn,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
REG_USER_ID = #{regUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
REG_DT = #{regDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
LAST_MOD_USER_ID = #{lastModUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
LAST_MOD_DT = #{lastModDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where CONT_REL_NO = #{contRelNo,jdbcType=BIGINT} and CONT_REL_SEQ = #{contRelSeq,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update t_cont_rel set CONT_REL_GB_CD = #{contRelGbCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CONT_ROLE = #{contRole,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CONT_NO = #{contNo,jdbcType=BIGINT}, LINK_CONT_NO = #{linkContNo,jdbcType=BIGINT}, CONT_REL_INFO = #{contRelInfo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CONT_REL_USE_YN = #{contRelUseYn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, REG_USER_ID = #{regUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, REG_DT = #{regDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, LAST_MOD_USER_ID = #{lastModUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LAST_MOD_DT = #{lastModDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where CONT_REL_NO = #{contRelNo,jdbcType=BIGINT} and CONT_REL_SEQ = #{contRelSeq,jdbcType=BIGINT}
